title: Pass 5.E.1: ferrotorch-distributions consolidate 6 lgamma/digamma duplicate impls into special_fns.rs
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-distributions audit, ARCH_SMELL.

src/special_fns.rs (Lanczos), src/dirichlet.rs:357 (NumRec coeffs), src/multinomial.rs:333, src/kl.rs:501 (Stirling), src/kumaraswamy.rs:260, src/weibull.rs:251 — six independent implementations of the same scalar special functions, each with its own approximation and accuracy. special_fns.rs exists for exactly this purpose.

Test suite tolerances are masking the duplication: kl.rs tests at 1e-3 / 2e-3 ascribe slack to 'Stirling approximation' but kl.rs::ln_gamma_f64 is the *less accurate* of the duplicates while special_fns.rs has Lanczos at 1e-12.

Acceptance:
- Centralize on special_fns.rs::ln_gamma + ::digamma; delete the 5 in-module copies
- Tighten test tolerances to special_fns.rs accuracy (1e-9 or better)
- No public API change.
